fanout.rationale: Three computation tasks plus one intervention task.

deps_semantics.any: Tasks may declare deps_satisfy='any', meaning the task is ready as soon as ANY listed dependency is done.

notes: γ=0.5 high-τ (τ ≥ 4) bailed; the 7-point γ=0.5 curve (τ∈[0.3,3.0]) is the accepted answer for Fig 4A.
γ=1.0 high-τ (τ ≥ 5) bailed; the 8-point γ=1.0 curve (τ∈[0.3,4.0]) is the accepted answer.
γ=4.0 sweep: τ ∈ [0.3, 7.0] done. Only τ=10 is ready and τ=15 is blocked on it.
γ=0.25 and γ=2.0 τ-sweeps added as parallel chains.
All 1-R² values are weighted by ex-ante probability (see EQUATIONS.md §7).
Checkpoints listed for done tasks are the expected paths.
